metrics.name: stackra.attribution.profiles.total
metrics.description: Count of active attribution profiles per (subject_type, lifecycle_state). Sampled hourly. Powers the lifecycle-summary dashboard card.

metrics.name: stackra.attribution.profiles.created_total
metrics.description: New profiles created. source_bucket ∈ { paid, organic, social, referral, direct, email, affiliate, unknown }.

metrics.name: stackra.attribution.converted_total
metrics.description: Conversion count per first-touch source bucket. First-touch attribution model.

metrics.name: stackra.attribution.merged_total
metrics.description: Enterprise-only. Merge count per outcome (first_touch overwritten or not).

metrics.name: stackra.attribution.merge_absorbed_count_bucket
metrics.description: How many anonymous profiles were absorbed per merge. Distribution should be heavy on 1-2; long tail indicates a proxy misconfiguration.

metrics.name: stackra.attribution.reset_requested_total
metrics.description: trigger ∈ { user_request, admin_action, regulator_request, force_reset }. Compliance signal.

metrics.name: stackra.attribution.touchpoints.captured_total
metrics.description: High-volume counter. touchpoint_type has 11 values (see events.json AttributionTouchpointCaptured).

metrics.name: stackra.attribution.touchpoint_write_duration_ms
metrics.description: AttributionTouchpointObserver.creating latency. P99 target < 20ms — this fires on every attribution-bearing HTTP request. Drift indicates index bloat.

metrics.name: stackra.attribution.middleware_duration_ms
metrics.description: AttributionMiddleware total duration (from consent check → snapshot binding). P99 target < 50ms.

metrics.name: stackra.attribution.consent_suppressions_total
metrics.description: consent_state_summary ∈ { marketing_off, advertising_off, both_off, partial }. Compliance signal — the rate proves the consent gate fires. Sudden spikes indicate a consent-gate misconfiguration or a large bulk-revocation event.

metrics.name: stackra.attribution.click_ids.captured_total
metrics.description: provider_hint ∈ { google, meta, tiktok, microsoft, snapchat, none }. Distribution of click-ID sources — competitive intel for the growth team's channel-mix analysis.

metrics.name: stackra.attribution.rollup.computed_total
metrics.description: CampaignRollupAggregatorJob completion count. Should tick hourly on every rollup-entitled tenant.

metrics.name: stackra.attribution.rollup.compute_duration_ms
metrics.description: Full rollup pass latency per tenant. P99 target < 10s on large tenants.

metrics.name: stackra.attribution.count_drift_corrections
metrics.description: CRITICAL. ReconcileAttributionCountsJob correction count. Should stay at 0. Every fire is a data-integrity signal.

metrics.name: stackra.attribution.reset.audit_hold_purges_total
metrics.description: AttributionResetConfirmed fire count. Tracks completions of the 90-day audit hold post-reset.

metrics.name: stackra.attribution.retention.purged_total
metrics.description: row_type ∈ { attribution, touchpoint }. PurgeArchivedAttributionsJob's per-run count.

metrics.name: stackra.attribution.entitlement.gate_refusals_total
metrics.description: Number of route hits refused by the entitlement middleware. Product signal for upgrade-CTA impressions.
